summary: Client Payment Card Management Testing COMPLETE. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All 10 feature checks passed. Login, My Account page loading, tab navigation (Profil/Reservations/Paiement), saved card display, add card form with Stripe Elements, cancel button, and Stripe security notice all working correctly.

client_card_management.test_get_cards_returns_list: PASS - Returns array of saved cards with id, brand, last4, exp_month, exp_year
client_card_management.test_get_cards_has_visa_5377: PASS - Found expected Visa card ending in 5377
client_card_management.test_delete_card_invalid_id: PASS - Returns error for invalid card ID

client_profile.test_get_client_profile: PASS - Returns profile with firstName, lastName, email, phoneNumber

my_account_page.tabs_present: PASS - Profil, Reservations, Paiement tabs all visible
my_account_page.profile_section: PASS - Shows user info (ARTHUR SAROYAN, ARTHURHAYY@GMAIL.COM)

payment_tab.section_display: PASS - data-testid='payment-section' visible when tab clicked

add_card_form.form_display: PASS - Stripe CardElement loads when 'Ajouter une carte' clicked
add_card_form.cancel_button: PASS - 'Annuler' button visible and hides form when clicked

stripe_security.notice_displayed: PASS - 'Vos donnees de paiement sont securisees par Stripe' notice visible

features_verified.GET /api/proxy/client/cards: Returns saved cards array with id, brand, last4, exp_month, exp_year
features_verified.GET /api/proxy/client/add-card: Returns Stripe SetupIntent clientSecret for 3D Secure
features_verified.DELETE /api/proxy/client/cards/{card_id}: Returns error for invalid card ID (proper error handling)
features_verified.POST /api/proxy/auth/login: Returns accessToken, firstName, lastName for client login
features_verified.Frontend Payment Tab: Shows 'Mes cartes bancaires' with saved cards, delete buttons, add card form
features_verified.Stripe Elements Integration: CardElement loads correctly with 3D Secure support
features_verified.Tab Navigation: All 3 tabs (Profil, Reservations, Paiement) work correctly

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for card elements (card-{last4}, delete-card-{last4}, add-card-btn, confirm-add-card)
XHR wrapper used instead of fetch to avoid Stripe.js body stream conflict - good practice
Stripe Elements properly loaded only when user clicks 'Ajouter une carte' - lazy loading
Card display shows brand, last4, and expiration correctly
Security notice about Stripe displayed properly
French translations consistent throughout (Paiement, Ajouter une carte, Annuler)

client_login.note: Has 1 saved Visa card ending in 5377

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing client account with Stripe card
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client card management feature fully working. My Account page has 3 tabs: Profil, Reservations, Paiement. Payment tab shows saved cards from C# API via /api/proxy/client/cards. Add card uses Stripe SetupIntent from /api/proxy/client/add-card. Delete button triggers /api/proxy/client/cards/{card_id} DELETE. Stripe uses LIVE keys (pk_live_*). Test client has 1 Visa card ending in 5377.

mocked_api.note: No APIs mocked. All endpoints proxy to real C# API at api.zont.cab. Stripe uses LIVE keys.
